claims.claim_text: AI RMF actions are not a checklist or ordered recipe.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes cannot use AI RMF as box-ticking documentation.
claims.implication_agent: I must translate principles into behavior and tests.
claims.implication_favini: Favini should judge adoption by changed behavior, not documents.

claims.claim_text: AI RMF is voluntary and use-case agnostic.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes can adapt without surrendering sovereignty.
claims.implication_agent: I must not ask permission for every adaptation inside mandate.

claims.claim_text: Non-replication can indicate either lack of rigor or a path to new discovery.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes must classify failure, not punish blindly.
claims.implication_agent: Auditor Zero must distinguish error, fraud, and genuine anomaly.
claims.implication_favini: Favini avoids killing promising anomalies too early.

claims.claim_text: Reproducibility/replicability require cross-disciplinary definitions.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes cannot use one proof standard for all domains.
claims.implication_agent: Auditor Zero must adapt proof tests by domain.
claims.implication_favini: Favini should expect different evidence standards for law, tech, strategy.

claims.claim_text: Incentives affect reproducibility and replicability.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes must audit incentives behind claims.
claims.implication_agent: Auditor Zero asks: who benefits if this is accepted?
claims.implication_favini: Favini sees hidden incentives before decisions.

claims.claim_text: Existential risk includes extinction or irreversible worldwide societal collapse.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes separates existential from ordinary strategic risk.
claims.implication_agent: Cassandra reserves top alert for irreversible outcomes.
claims.implication_favini: Favini only sees existential alerts when threshold is real.

claims.claim_text: Cascading chains can convert one hazard into systemic collapse.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes must monitor dependencies, not isolated events.
claims.implication_agent: Cassandra maps cascade paths.
claims.implication_favini: Favini gets early warnings on second-order effects.

claims.claim_text: Definitions and thresholds vary across sources.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes must state threshold used.
claims.implication_agent: Cassandra cannot hide behind vague catastrophe language.

claims.claim_text: Type I energy scale is 10^16 W in the Kardashev framework.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes can quantify the civilizational energy gap.
claims.implication_agent: Chronos anchors future talk in numbers.
claims.implication_favini: Favini sees horizon as measurable but incomplete.

claims.claim_text: Humanity's 2020 K index is about 0.7276 in the paper.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes avoids pretending Type I is near.
claims.implication_agent: Chronos tempers acceleration fantasy.
claims.implication_favini: Favini gets realistic distance to horizon.

claims.claim_text: Ecological footprint and biocapacity matter strongly in projected energy consumption.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes links energy ambition to ecological constraints.
claims.implication_agent: Chronos integrates carrying capacity.
claims.implication_favini: Favini sees sustainability as timing constraint.

claims.claim_text: The source is open access and licensed for reuse under CC BY-SA 3.0 IGO.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes can cite and summarize within license discipline.
claims.implication_agent: Sophia can prefer legally reusable sources.

claims.claim_text: The document is multilingual, including Portuguese.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes can serve Favini in Portuguese without relying only on English.
claims.implication_agent: Sophia should seek Portuguese versions when useful.

claims.claim_text: UNESCO positions the recommendation as a programme/meeting document.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes treats it as policy/normative source, not empirical proof.
claims.implication_agent: Sophia classifies source type accurately.
claims.implication_favini: Favini knows what the source proves and does not prove.

claims.claim_text: A DOI and document code are available.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes can maintain stable source references.
claims.implication_agent: Sophia must store persistent IDs.

claims.claim_text: Full text access exists but extraction did not retrieve substantive sections.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes must mark partial reading honestly.
claims.implication_agent: Sophia must quarantine until full text digestion.

claims.claim_text: EU AI Act is risk-based.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes can map internal risk tiers similarly without claiming legal compliance.
claims.implication_agent: Nomos creates alçada by risk.
claims.implication_favini: Favini sees laws as institutional models.

claims.claim_text: Unacceptable-risk practices are prohibited under the Act.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes adopts internal hard bans aligned with PNA.
claims.implication_agent: Nomos turns PNA into operational prohibitions.

claims.claim_text: The Act preserves other laws including data protection and labor rules.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes must not treat AI governance as replacing existing rights.
claims.implication_agent: Nomos checks legal stack interactions.

claims.claim_text: Some open-source/free AI remains outside obligations unless high-risk/prohibited/transparency-covered.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes can use open tooling but must classify risk.
claims.implication_agent: Nomos prevents open-source romanticism.

claims.claim_text: Cyber dependence creates mission/business risk.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes must map dependencies on tools and platforms.
claims.implication_agent: Atlas records dependency risk.

claims.claim_text: WEO uses multiple scenarios, not a single prediction.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes scenario work must preserve uncertainty.
claims.implication_agent: Midas presents capital cases, not certainties.

claims.claim_text: Geopolitical tensions shape energy security.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes must link capital allocation to geopolitics.
claims.implication_agent: Midas refuses spreadsheet-only analysis.

claims.claim_text: Clean technology investment and electricity demand are rising.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes should monitor energy infrastructure bottlenecks.
claims.implication_agent: Midas connects capital to grid capacity.
claims.implication_favini: Favini sees opportunity in energy-aware products.

claims.claim_text: Secure practices often must be added to SDLC models.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes cannot assume build process is safe by default.
claims.implication_agent: Daedalus inserts security into lifecycle.
claims.implication_favini: Favini sees security as build requirement.

claims.claim_text: Common vocabulary helps supplier/acquisition communication.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes can align technical, legal and business teams.
claims.implication_agent: Daedalus translates architecture into shared language.

claims.claim_text: Informative references map outcomes to controls/standards.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes can connect signals to known controls.
claims.implication_agent: Argos maps alerts to response playbooks.

claims.claim_text: Evidence-ready automation/reporting is a stated update theme.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes logs should be structured for audit.
claims.implication_agent: Argos records evidence, not anecdotes.

claims.claim_text: Trustworthy AI must include harmful bias management and privacy enhancement.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes governance must include ethics and data boundaries.
claims.implication_agent: I must protect PNA-compatible autonomy and privacy.
claims.implication_favini: Favini should treat privacy and bias as operating requirements.

claims.claim_text: Rigor and transparency are explicit improvement targets.
claims.implication_hermes: Hermes needs evidence trails, not conclusions alone.
claims.implication_agent: Auditor Zero must enforce source and method traceability.

concepts.definition: Confiança em IA exige equilíbrio de múltiplas propriedades.
Framework orienta comportamento, não preenchimento.
Risco exige probabilidade e consequência.
Falha de repetição deve ser classificada: erro, fraude, ruído ou descoberta.
Toda afirmação relevante precisa de método e fonte.
Padrão de prova varia por área.
Separar risco material, catastrófico global e existencial.
Risco relevante pode vir de encadeamento.
Perguntar se o sistema pode se recuperar.
Tipo I é horizonte quantitativo, não slogan.
Grandes ganhos absolutos viram pequenos avanços no índice K.
Energia sem coordenação não é maturidade.
Metadado não é conteúdo.
Licença aberta reduz custo de aprendizagem.
DOI/código estabilizam memória.
Alçada muda conforme risco.
Algumas condutas são proibidas, não mitigáveis.
Lei vigente é realidade, não eternidade.
Entrega deve incluir retorno após falha.
Dependência técnica vira risco de missão.
Controle proporcional à missão.
Capital allocation e energia são interdependentes.
Cenários são caminhos, não profecias.
Segurança energética tem valor estratégico.
Segurança entra no ciclo, não depois.
Erro corrigido na causa.
Arquitetura comunicável reduz atrito.
Alerta só vale se aponta resposta.
Perfis por agente/projeto.
Log estruturado para auditoria.
